title: Specialty Registry
description: The canonical, static list of Specialty descriptors — Phase 3/WHIMS Batch WPI-2 (docs/50-PHASE-3-TECHNICAL-PLAN.md §6.1/§19, ADR-018, docs/53-PHASE-3-IMPLEMENTATION-RULES.md governs this and every later batch). Pillar 3 (docs/49 §4) — the platform's only mechanism for naming which specialty a doctor, patient, or registry entry (Module, Calculator, Template, Doctor Module) is associated with, mirroring shared/constants/module-registry.json's own 'availability, not enablement' framing. Seeded, in this batch, with exactly one entry — the platform's current, implicit specialty (homeopathy), named explicitly for the first time (docs/49 §3.1, ADR-018) — no second specialty is populated; onboarding one is a future, separately approved product decision, never assumed by this registry's existence. Adding the optional `specialty_scope` field to Module Registry, Calculator Registry, or Template Registry entries happens independently, in whichever future batch first registers an entry that actually needs it (docs/53 §4) — this registry only makes a real Specialty record resolvable; it does not itself edit any of those three frozen files (docs/50 §3). apps-script/SpecialtyRegistry.gs hand-ports this list into its own Foundation-prefixed array, the same convention module-registry.json's own consumers already use.
